---
title: "Dr. Flávia Lombardi Lopes"
about:
  id: contact
  template: jolla
  image: assets/fll.jpeg
---

::: {#contact}
{{< fa regular envelope >}} [flavia.lopes\@unesp.br](mailto:flavia.lopes@unesp.br)

{{< fa brands instagram >}}  [@epilab.fmva](https://www.instagram.com/epilab.fmva)

{{< fa brands tiktok >}} [@epilab.fmva](https://www.tiktok.com/@epilab.fmva)

{{< fa brands github >}} [@epigenomicslab-unesp](https://github.com/epigenomicslab-unesp)

{{< fa location-dot >}} Department of Production and Animal Health, São Paulo State University, Brazil
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: make map

library(leaflet)

icon <- makeIcon(
  iconUrl = "assets/epilab_logo.png",
  iconWidth = 40,
  iconHeight = 40
)

leaflet() |>
  addTiles() |>
  setView(lng = -50.439099 , lat = -21.186921, zoom = 16) |>
  addMarkers(
    lng = -50.439099,
    lat = -21.186921,
    icon = icon,
    popup = "<b>Epilab</b>"
  )
```
